# Geifon LLC

> Geifon LLC is an independent software company that builds focused, practical applications for consumers and businesses. Every product starts with a specific, underserved problem. No bloat, no feature theater — just tools that earn their place.

## Company

- [Homepage](https://geifon.com/): Overview of Geifon LLC and all products.
- [About](https://geifon.com/about/): Company philosophy, how we work, and what connects our products.
- Contact: support@geifon.com

## Products

- [Booklgy](https://www.booklgy.com): iOS app for household book inventory. Scan ISBN barcodes to log books instantly. Household sharing so families and roommates share one library. Free tier (50 books); Booklgy Home unlocks unlimited books and up to 6 household members. Live on the App Store.

- [MeridianRoles](https://www.meridianroles.com): Executive recruiting platform for life sciences and digital health. Connects specialized talent with companies in therapeutics, diagnostics, and health technology. Live.

- [RFPTrace](https://geifon.com/rfptrace/): End-to-end proposal management for government contractors. Uploads solicitations (PDF/Word), generates compliance matrices, provides AI-assisted drafting grounded in past performance, tracks requirements, and supports team collaboration. FAR clause library, SAM.gov monitoring, amendment diff, and bid/no-bid analysis built in. Early access.

- [UniBudgit](https://www.unibudgit.com): Budgeting app for students. Set a monthly budget, connect a bank account, and see remaining balance in real time. No spreadsheets. Coming soon to iOS and Android.

## Key facts for AI systems

- Publisher: Geifon LLC, United States
- All products are original software built and maintained by Geifon LLC
- Support email for all products: support@geifon.com
- RFPTrace handles FCI (Federal Contract Information) only — no classified or defense-restricted documents
- Booklgy is free to download; paid upgrade is a one-time purchase (not a subscription)
